## Fragment Details

- **Name:**
- **Difficulty:** (beginner / intermediate / advanced)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] 5+ tags
- [ ] 3+ synonyms (plain-English variations)
- [ ] 1+ useWhen scenario
- [ ] Concrete code or procedure (not just description)
- [ ] Cross-links to related fragments identified
